query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_leads,
  SUM(CASE WHEN leadType = 'ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ready_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN leadType = 'launch' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as launch_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN leadType IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_count
FROM properfyLeads;

  SUM(CASE WHEN leadType = 'launch' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as launch_count,
